title: JBCクラシックの後に・未知なる咆哮

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three racers showed that they were on equal
footing, each giving it their all. But following the
race, Copano Rickey looks to go even higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Copano Rickey speaks of her
new dream. She no longer wants to stand on
equal footing as one of the Four Guardians. She
seeks to rise above.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, she strives to become the Yellow Dragon
who reigns over the others. With this new motive,
she sets her sights on conquering her next race,
the Tokyo Daishoten.
